rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on polishing the artifact's writing at the sentence and paragraph levels for better grammar, flow, register, and conciseness, making it load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties in the research claims is a peripheral nice-to-have when cleaning up the text to ensure balanced presentation.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is central when cleaning contribution and novelty statements in the research artifact to maintain accuracy.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope of the V2G scheduling topic is peripheral to the cleaning task.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not requested as the artifact on V2G scheduling does not suggest potential harms requiring mitigation.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral for this text-cleaning delegation without evident external sources or data.
